audit-facility.description: 'local0': Local use; 'local1': Local use; 'local2': Local use; 'local3': Local use; 'local4': Local use; 'local5': Local use; 'local6': Local use; 'local7': Local use;  (Configure the facility of auditlog)

port.description: Set remote audit log port number(Default 514)

levelname.description: 'disable': Do not send log to buffer; 'emergency': System unusable log messages      (severity=0); 'alert': Action must be taken immediately  (severity=1); 'critical': Critical conditions               (severity=2); 'error': Error conditions                  (severity=3); 'warning': Warning conditions                (severity=4); 'notification': Normal but significant conditions (severity=5); 'information': Informational messages            (severity=6); 'debugging': Debug level messages              (severity=7);

line-feed-in-udp-syslog.description: Add newline for syslog over UDP

console-levelname.description: 'disable': Do not send log to console; 'emergency': System unusable log messages      (severity=0); 'alert': Action must be taken immediately  (severity=1); 'critical': Critical conditions               (severity=2); 'error': Error conditions                  (severity=3); 'warning': Warning conditions                (severity=4); 'notification': Normal but significant conditions (severity=5); 'information': Informational messages            (severity=6); 'debugging': Debug level messages              (severity=7);

number.description: Number of log messages that can be buffered (Number of log messages that can be buffered, default 50)

time.description: Number of minutes a log message can stay in buffer (Number of minutes a log message can stay in buffer, default 10)

expression.description: Reverse Polish Notation, consists of level 0-7, module AFLEX/HMON/..., pattern log-content-pattern, and or/and/not

email-levelname.description: 'disable': Do not send log to email address; 'emergency': System unusable log messages      (severity=0); 'alert': Action must be taken immediately   (severity=1); 'critical': Critical conditions      (severity=2); 'notification': Normal but significant conditions (severity=5);

'disable': Do not send log to email address; 'emergency': System unusable log messages      (severity=0); 'alert': Action must be taken immediately   (severity=1); 'critical': Critical conditions      (severity=2); 'notification': Normal but significant conditions (severity=5);

time.description: Number of minutes a log message can stay in buffer (Number of minutes a log message can stay in buffer, default 10)
